series_metadata.series_description: Images of warrants generated directly by the Office of Budget Management (OBM), pension funds, and other state agencies. Images are generated by the financial institution at which the warrant is presented for payment, and electronically transmitted to the Treasurer''s office on a daily basis. Images can be retrieved so long as the following information is provided: (a) name of agency that requested issuance of the warrant; (b) warrant number; and (c) warrant amount. This retention schedule does not apply to images of checks directly printed by the Treasurer''s office on behalf of custodial accounts, as such images are retained by the bank upon which the check was drawn.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: images and associated metadata viewing on redeemed warrant database seven years from date that warrant image was transmitted Treasurer''s office. Automatic script will run on a daily basis which will automatically delete all warrant images and associated metadata that are older than seven years
